crs_wkt:
GEOGCRS["WGS 84",
    DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",
        ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563]],
    CS[ellipsoidal,2],
        AXIS["latitude",north],
        AXIS["longitude",east],
        ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]
    USAGE[
        SCOPE["grid"],
        BBOX[-90.0,-180.0,90.0,179.75]]]
